items.title: ICC suspends top prosecutor after investigating misconduct allegations
items.dek: Karim Khan denies all allegations of sexual misconduct and his lawyers say he rejects the decision in the strongest terms.
items.body: Karim Khan denies all allegations of sexual misconduct and his lawyers say he rejects the decision in the strongest terms.

items.title: Xi Jinping and Kim Jong Un vow stronger ties as North Korea visit wraps up
items.dek: Xi has wrapped up a two-day visit to Pyongyang, his first official trip to North Korea since 2019.
items.body: Xi has wrapped up a two-day visit to Pyongyang, his first official trip to North Korea since 2019.
